next_steps: Perform urgent ophthalmologic examination (fundoscopy) for papilledema
Obtain MRI brain with MR venography (MRV) and contrast
Check current coagulation profile (PT/INR) and platelet count
Check erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP)
Correct coagulopathy (FFP/Vitamin K) prior to any consideration of lumbar puncture
Perform lumbar puncture with opening pressure, cell count, and microbiology after coagulopathy is addressed
